ogTitle: Dignams Creek vs Dilpurra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dignams Creek and Dilpurra.
heading: Dignams Creek vs Dilpurra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dignams Creek, New South Wales and Dilpurra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dilpurra has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Dignams Creek (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dignams Creek or Dilpurra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dignams Creek has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Dilpurra scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dignams Creek scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Dilpurra scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dignams Creek or Dilpurra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dilpurra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
